name: Cottage Cheese Sun-Dried Tomato Dip
recipeIngredient: 4 pieces green onion, cut into quarters
2 tablespoons fresh basil, or 2 teaspoons dried basil
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender.
2. Process until smooth, stopping occasionally to scrape the sides.
3. Serve with green, red, and yellow pepper squares or other fresh vegetables.
4. Yield: 2 cups (wrv)
